sql_array: CREATE TABLE s3_data (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE s3_data SET name = 'Updated Name' WHERE id = 1;

SELECT name FROM s3('https://example-bucket.s3.region.amazonaws.com/data/*.csv', 'CSVWithNames', extra_credentials(role_arn = 'arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/ClickHouseAccessRole-001')) WHERE id < 100;
